setup.lang.title: Choose display language
setup.lang.prompt: Select the language for this helper tool. You can change it later in Settings.
setup.arena.title: Locate the game
setup.arena.intro: Let's get translations ready. Please run The Elder Scrolls: Arena and keep it running. The translation files are built from your game's data.
setup.arena.running_required: Please start the game (Arena), then continue. Once it is running, press "Re-check".
setup.arena.detected: Detected the running game. The install location was filled in automatically.
setup.arena.invalid: ✗ This is not a valid game folder. Please select the game's install folder.
setup.gen.running: Building. This may take up to a minute…
